Dumbbell Plot Type

Source: R/type_premier.R
type_dumbbell.Rd

Creates elegant dumbbell charts for comparing two time points or conditions. Shows change with connected points and magnitude.

Usage

type_dumbbell(
  point_size = 3,
  line_width = 0.8,
  color_first = "#4DBBD5",
  color_second = "#E64B35"
)

Arguments

point_size

Point size (default 3)

line_width

Connecting line width (default 0.8)

color_first

Color for first time point

color_second

Color for second time point

Value

A cliplot_type object
